topIngredients.name: Purple Rice (Oryza Sativa)
topIngredients.benefit: Antioxidant-rich ingredient that protects against environmental damage

topIngredients.name: Vitamin E (Tocopherol)
topIngredients.benefit: Nourishes and protects the skin barrier

verdict: Tatcha Dewy Skin Cream delivers a uniquely luminous finish powered by Japanese purple rice antioxidants. Ideal for normal to dry skin seeking a healthy glow. The premium price reflects the specialty botanical ingredients.
